title.rationale: Identifying the core themes and research focus of the paper.

motivation.rationale: Understanding the core issues the research aims to address and the observed phenomena.

problem_statement.rationale: Specific description of the overthinking issues of o1 class LLM.

key_observation.rationale: Extract quantitative evidence of overthinking issues

research_goal.rationale: Record the specific objectives to be achieved in the research.

overthinking_observations.rationale: Detailed documentation of specific issues encountered during the experiment.

excessive_solution_rounds.description: Phenomenon of excessive rounds of solutions
excessive_solution_rounds.rationale: The model records unnecessary multi-turn solutions for simple problems.

diminishing_accuracy_returns.rationale: The phenomenon of subsequent solutions having a negligible impact on accuracy improvement.

solution_repetition.rationale: Document the issue of insufficient diversity in solutions.

evaluation_metrics.rationale: Records used to quantify metrics for overthinking issues.

outcome_efficiency_metric.rationale: Measure the token efficiency corresponding to the first correct answer.

process_efficiency_metric.rationale: Token efficiency in measuring solution diversity

metric_application_finding.rationale: Key findings after recording application metrics

mitigation_methods.rationale: Documentation of proposed training and optimization methodologies.

method_overview.rationale: 记录训练方法的整体框架

training_procedure.rationale: 记录数据生成和样本选择方法

method_finding.rationale: 记录训练方法的效果观察

solution_simplification_strategies.rationale: Specific strategies for recording response simplification

fcs_strategy.rationale: 记录首次正确解决方案方法

fcs_reflection_strategy.rationale: 记录带反思的解决方案方法

gds_strategy.rationale: 记录贪婪多样化解决方案方法

experimental_results.rationale: Performance of the recording method across various test sets.

length_preference_results.rationale: Record the performance of different optimization methods in reducing token count.

response_simplification_results.rationale: Document the effects and trade-offs of various simplification strategies.

challenging_dataset_results.rationale: Generalization ability of recording methods on challenging datasets

test_datasets.rationale: 记录使用的挑战性测试集信息

performance_results.rationale: 提取在挑战性测试集上的具体表现

broader_implications.rationale: Document the contribution of research to the understanding of resource utilization.
